results.title: Far-Left Mamdani-Backed Candidate BOOTS Incumbent Democrat Rep. Dan Goldman in New York House Primary in Landslide * The Gateway Pundit * by Cristina Laila
results.description: New York lurched farther left on Tuesday night. Levi Strauss nepo baby and incumbent Democrat Rep. Dan Goldman got ousted on Tuesday night by a far-left Mamdani-backed candidate in New York’s House primary. Rep. Goldman got trounced by former New York City Comptroller Brad Lander in the race for New York’s 10th Congressional District. Dan Goldman in New York House Primary in Landslide * The Gateway Pundit * by Cristina Laila appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Our View: Government once again pandering to the unions
results.description: The government has bowed to union pressure with regard to its pension reform plan. After a meeting of the Labour Advisory Body, Labour Minister Marinos Mousiouttas said there had been second thoughts by the government which had decided to delay the tabling of the bill in the legislature. results.title: Simpson secures SC agriculture nomination over son of former Clemson coach: NYT
results.description: Cody Simpson arrives at the at the South Carolina Election Commission on Monday, March 16, 2026. Simpson is running for Commissioner of Agriculture.
